state.next-action: M4 complete + M4.9 gap-close: per-task files, stamp, tasks list attribution, dual-write session. Morning: gad team start --profile default, gad tui /workers.

archived-next-action.note: Pre-2026-04-19-sweep-D essay style; preserved here for one cycle then will be deleted. Future agents: append to <state-log> via `gad state log` instead.

state.archived-next-action: 2026-04-19 sweep C (diff-noise full audit, follow-up to sweep B): operator asked "anything else that hiccups our diffs similarly... a lot of our logs from differing agents will cause diff and merge conflict issues." Audited vendor/.gitignore vs `git log --since=60d --name-only` churn — found 1,800+ commits/60d of pure noise across 71 files in two tiers, none of which any consumer needs committed. Tier 1 (append-only logs + per-agent state, 40 files): .planning/.trace-events.jsonl (95 commits), .planning/.trace-seq (95), .planning/.gad-log/*.jsonl (5 daily files, ~85 commits), .planning/sessions/s-*.json (33 per-agent session files). Tier 2 (deterministic site-build outputs from `npm run prebuild`, 31 files): site/lib/*.generated.{ts,json} (5 files, 150 commits), site/data/*.json (12 files, 69 commits), site/public/llms{,-full}.txt + site/public/api/docs.json (3 files, 147 commits), site/public/downloads/*.zip + downloads/planning/*.zip (11 files, 1,242 commits — requirements/*.{xml,md} preserved, those are source). All entries added to vendor/.gitignore with header documenting source/regen pipeline + which build script reads them. `git rm --cached` 71 files. site/scripts/pack-site-release.cjs gains warnIfTraceMissing() — non-fatal log when packaging from a fresh clone with no local trace history (self-eval ships as empty stub, which is fine for CLI-only contributors). Build pipeline impact: zero — build-site-data.mjs writes all Tier 2 paths via `predev`/`prebuild` on first `npm run dev` or `npm run build`; compute-self-eval.mjs already degrades gracefully when trace inputs missing. Net effect: ~70% reduction in vendor diff churn, kills the dominant multi-agent merge-conflict surface (sessions/, trace, generated/, downloads/). No source data lost — templates/, evals/, docs/, .planning/*.xml all stay tracked. Planning note: `.planning/notes/2026-04-19-diff-noise-sweep.md`. Earlier today (sweep B): .planning/graph.{json,html} now gitignored — operator surfaced the constant-diff-noise problem. Tracked copies removed via `git rm --cached`. bin/gad.cjs gains `ensureGraphFresh(baseDir, root)` helper that delegates to graphExtractor.loadOrBuildGraph for staleness check (TASK-REGISTRY/ROADMAP/DECISIONS mtimes) and writes graph.html alongside when rebuilt. Wired into snapshotV2Cmd + startupCmd post-projectid-resolution. Both guard on !sideEffectsSuppressed(). Smoke verified: rm both → snapshot prints "[snapshot] graph cache rebuilt (missing)" + writes both; touch TASK-REGISTRY.xml → next snapshot prints "(stale)"; subsequent snapshot silent (fresh). site/scripts/pack-site-release.cjs gains ensureFrameworkGraph() that runs `node bin/gad.cjs graph build --projectid get-anything-done` before staging if .planning/graph.json missing — keeps site/data/planning-graph.json (baked into release zip) from shipping as empty stub on fresh checkout. site/data/planning-graph.json itself remains tracked (separate site-data convention). 63-graph-task-stale resolution extended with full 2026-04-19 strengthening narrative. README.txt in pack-site-release updated to surface launcher-<platform>-<arch>.exe variants and demote portable-Node hint (44-34 cancelled). 2026-04-19 sweep A (earlier today): 44-34 CANCELLED (operator decision) — portable-Node bootstrap superseded by Bun-compiled launcher.exe; bin/install.js cleaned up (`installPortableNodeStub` removed; `--node` flag now prints deprecation notice + no-op for one release window; help block demoted `--node` to dim/deprecated row). 44-32 follow-ups landed: (e) interactive feature picker `promptFeatures` shipped — no-flag invocation asks {planning, site, skills, all} with multi-select; skills-branch chains into existing promptRuntime+promptLocation. (tests) dedicated `tests/installer-feature-flags.test.cjs` shipped — 7/7 pass covering --help surface, --planning scaffold + idempotent + projectid derivation, --site graceful warn, --node deprecated no-op, combined --planning --site. 44-33 follow-ups landed: (c-bun) launcher.cjs refactored to dual-mode (Node-subprocess default; in-process require under Bun-compile detected via `typeof Bun !== "undefined"`; `GAD_LAUNCHER_FORCE_SPAWN=1` escape hatch). pack-site-release.cjs detects `bun` on PATH and runs `bun build --compile --target=<host>` (or `GAD_LAUNCHER_TARGETS=bun-windows-x64,bun-linux-x64,bun-darwin-x64` for cross-target) producing `launcher-<platform>-<arch>.exe` alongside launcher.cjs (failure non-fatal — Node-shim still ships). Smoke-verified: `bun build --compile site/scripts/launcher.cjs` produces a 111 MB self-contained .exe that runs and prints the correct missing-server.js error. (guard) `scripts/publish-release.mjs` extended with `ensureSiteZipIfRequired()` — fails publish if `site-v<tag>.zip` missing from `dist/release/`; opt-out via `GAD_SKIP_SITE_ZIP_GUARD=1` for CLI-only patch releases. Test coverage in tests/release-deprecation.test.cjs (artifact recognition + guard throw + skip-env). Tests overall: 23/23 across installer-feature-flags + release-deprecation + consumer-init-install. References/installer-feature-flags.md fully rewritten for the post-44-34 surface; "Cancelled (44-34)" + "Interactive picker" sections added; "Tests" table reflects shipped coverage. Planning note: `.planning/notes/2026-04-19-44-28-spine-second-cut.md`. Remaining 44-28 deferred follow-ups (carved into umbrella, not standalone tasks yet): 44-33c-ci (cross-compile launcher.exe in CI for all 3 platforms), 44-33c-verify (live runtime test of launcher.exe against real Next standalone build), 44-32-cleanup (remove --node flag entirely after one release deprecation window). Planned queue (graph rebuild post-changes): just GAD-T-44-28 (umbrella, awaiting CI cross-compile + live verify). 35-10 already closed earlier. Next: queue genuinely empty save the umbrella — operator picks the next thread.

state-log.entry: 74-01/02/03 done — projects init MD-sentinel guard, phases-add gitbash warn, decisions add --title optional
73-01 done — gad-tools.cjs: added 40+ missing workflow verbs, config tests 17→58/58 passing, smoke tests pass
63-55 done — removed TASK-REGISTRY.xml hard prerequisite from phases add; ensurePhaseInFile now conditional on file presence; tests updated to cover no-XML primary path
Closed phase 99 via gad phases close - 0 tasks done, 0 cancelled.

REOPENED phase 44.5 (Project Editor / Brood Editor / DNA Editor) — operator 2026-04-23: 'project-editor still not done and its regression fixed along with additions'. I paper-closed it earlier based on 24/24 task stamps but didn't verify operational state. Apology. Remaining work: regressions + feature additions that weren't captured as tasks.
Closed phase 42.5 via gad phases close - 11 tasks done, 0 cancelled.

Phase 42.5 close-out verified by team-w1: canonical catalog 73 skills, active retired-skill references clean, Claude open at 73, Cursor gated at 46 workspace / 58 combined, validate-canonical-assets passed.
Closed phase 53 via gad phases close - 20 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
completed 53-02 desktop gad.exe sidecar binding and wrappers in fdd72af
Closed phase 42.5 via gad phases close - 10 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 52 via gad phases close - 6 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 46 via gad phases close - 11 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 45 via gad phases close - 21 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 44.5 via gad phases close - 24 tasks done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 43 via gad phases close - 11 tasks done, 0 cancelled.

TweakCN phases 47/48/49 re-targeted to apps/desktop Settings (operator decision 2026-04-23). 10 tasks registered (47-01..04, 48-01..02, 49-01..04). Goal text updated to reflect Tauri WebView2 target + copy-paste theme export preservation (TweakCN native behavior). Not yet dispatched — codex queue has 6 open handoffs (05-26/30/31/32/33/34). Operator will trigger TweakCN kickoff after infra work settles.

Closed 6 more phases (all tasks done, status stuck at planned): 66 (CLI hygiene 11/11), 67 (CLI fix wave 2 2/2), 68 (monorepo reorg 3/3), 69 (Supabase wire 3/3), 70 (Marketplace move 3/3), 71 (Asset storage 5/5). Session total: 13 phases closed (42.2/42.3/42.4 + 51/55/59/60 + 66/67/68/69/70/71) + 5 cancelled (33/36/37/50/50.1) = 18 status changes. Remaining planned: 35 (2 in-progress), 43/44/44.5/45 (active sprint), 47/48/49 (TweakCN unstarted), 52/53 (1 task each), 54/56/57/58 (empty), 63 (22 open), 42.5 (graph quirk), 72 (distribution meta).

Cancelled 5 superseded phases: 33 (reverse-engineer eval), 36 (per-eval-repo + gad eval start/auto/finish — superseded by phase 43 species/generation rework), 37 (gad project CLI — superseded), 50 + 50.1 (apps/portfolio deprecated). Also stamped done: 63-11, 63-14, 63-17, 63-18, 63-19, 66-03 (close-out sweep for already-shipped work). Spot-checked 66 (loader fix + pre-commit hook + self-commands all shipped) and 67 (gad team --projectid + gad tui as subcommand both in 1.35.0) — look substantially done, full audit pending per-task.

Closed phases 42.2 / 42.3 / 42.4 — all tasks done/cancelled, phase status was stuck at planned. STATE current-phase still 42.4; operator picks next thread (43 domain rename, or open new phase for M4.9 gap-close).

Phase 66-01 (loader manifest fix) shipped: scripts/build-manifest.mjs generates bin/commands/_manifest.cjs at build time, _loader.cjs prefers it + topologically sorts provides phase, evolution.dependsOn=[evolution-images] annotates the one cross-dep. Bun-compiled v1.35.0 exe now registers team + all 64 command modules. Installed. Subagent working 52-01 scaffold in parallel.

sweep F (post-failure-callout): extracted 9 cmd families (phases, decisions, handoffs, readers, refs, narrative, start, subagents, agents, site). bin/gad.cjs 18181 to 16689 (-1492 LOC, factory pattern). all smokes + targeted tests pass.
sweep E shipped: extracted state/note/todos to bin/commands/ (factory pattern). gad.cjs 18437 -> 18181 LOC. Smoke + targeted tests pass. Pattern documented in CLAUDE.md.
sweep E: extracted state/note/todos to bin/commands/ (factory pattern)

Sweep D shipped: D-1 .gitattributes (kills phantom CRLF mods), D-2 vendor/CLAUDE.md (which-gad-to-invoke), D-3 gad state log (append-only), D-4 deleted V1 dead snapshotCmd+tasksCmd from gad.cjs (-361 lines, V2 renamed canonical), D-5 gad note add (agent-slug filenames). All smoke-verified on node bin/gad.cjs.
Validated D-3 atomic prepend (newest-first)
sweep D shipped: gitattributes, vendor CLAUDE.md, V1 dead-code purge, gad note add, gad state log
